name: Wisely (ADP) Pay Card & Digital Banking API
what_it_does: Wisely (ADP) REST API for employee pay card, digital banking, and financial wellness platform. Enables AI agents to manage pay card issuance and activation workflow for employer payroll distribution, handle direct deposit routing to Wisely digital accounts for payroll integration, access real-time pay card balance and transaction data for employee financial management, retrieve spending controls and card management data for employer payroll card programs, handle earned wage access and on-demand pay delivery to Wisely accounts, access financial wellness features including savings goals and spending analytics for employee benefit programs, manage card-not-present and mobile wallet integration data for digital payment management, retrieve fee schedule and account terms data for employer communication, handle unbanked employee payment distribution for inclusive payroll programs, and integrate Wisely account data with ADP payroll, HRIS, and employer benefits platforms.
use_cases: Distributing payroll to unbanked employees from payroll agents
Managing pay card programs from employer payroll agents
Enabling earned wage access from financial wellness agents
Tracking employee spending from financial benefit agents
not_for: Consumer banking without employer payroll distribution context
B2B payments without employee pay and payroll focus
High-income banked employees without unbanked/underbanked focus
best_when: An employer or payroll provider using ADP Wisely wants AI agents to automate pay card issuance, payroll distribution to unbanked employees, earned wage access, card management, and employee financial wellness program integration.
avoid_when: REGULATORY RISK: Pay cards for payroll must comply with state wage payment laws — not all states permit mandatory pay card as only payroll option; automated pay card-only enrollment without offering alternative payment methods creates state wage law violations. CFPB prepaid account rule requires fee disclosure; automated pay card enrollment without proper Regulation E and prepaid account disclosures creates consumer protection violations. Earned wage access via Wisely subject to evolving EWA regulations.

auth.notes: Wisely uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. ADP partner credentials required for integration. No webhooks. REST API with JSON. Roseland, New Jersey (ADP HQ). ADP acquired All Signs Point to Wisely in 2019; product is ADP Wisely. 10M+ card members. Strong integration with ADP payroll ecosystem. Unbanked and underbanked employee focus. Competes with DailyPay Card and PayActiv card for employee pay card market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — ADP partnership required
pricing.paid_tiers: Employer program fee; card transaction and interchange revenue model
pricing.notes: Roseland, New Jersey. ADP (ADP NASDAQ) subsidiary. ADP acquired Wisely (2019). 10M+ cardholders. ADP payroll-integrated pay card. Visa prepaid card. Wisely By ADP branded. Digital banking features: bill pay, savings, budgeting. Strong in hospitality, retail, and food service employer sectors. Competes with payroll cards from Comdata (FLEETCOR) and PaySign for employer pay card market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; ADP platform dependent

known_agent_gotchas: REGULATORY RISK: State wage payment laws require payment method alternatives; automated mandatory pay card enrollment without offering check or direct deposit violates state wage payment laws
CFPB prepaid account rule — Regulation E prepaid account disclosures (short form, long form) required at enrollment; automated enrollment without disclosure acknowledgment creates CFPB violations
ADP ecosystem dependency — Wisely is tightly coupled to ADP payroll; API access and functionality may be limited for non-ADP payroll customers
PCI DSS card data handling — pay card transaction data is PCI-scoped; automated processing must maintain PCI DSS compliance for cardholder data handling
State-specific pay card requirements — California, Maine, New Mexico have specific pay card written consent and fee restriction requirements; automated enrollment must apply state rules
Card activation timing — Wisely cards require activation before use; automated payroll distribution must verify card activation status before first pay period
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee pay card. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2/API key. US. Employee payroll and card transaction data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Pay card platform. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US. Employee payroll card data.
